name: Vanilla Sugar 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Flatten each vanilla bean lengthwise.
2. Cut the flattened beans into halves.
3. Using a small spoon, scrape out the seeds and discard them.
4. Combine the vanilla pods (without seeds) with the sugar in a jar.
5. Securely cover the jar.
6. Allow the mixture to sit at room temperature for several days
to infuse the sugar with vanilla flavor.
7. Use this flavored sugar in place of regular sugar when preparing desserts.
8. Store any unused portion of the flavored sugar indefinitely.
9. When using, replace the used sugar with fresh granulated sugar.
10. (Optional) For enhanced flavor in baking, return rinsed and thoroughly dried
vanilla pods to the remaining sugar mixture.
